title: EnderEX
description: A Plug and play or highly customisable enderchest plugin.
body:

[![Discord link image][image]][hyperlink]

(tooltip)

An example screenshot is available in the gallery tab

# EnderEX by INFINITY Studios.

## Main Features

- Plug and Play OR Highly customisable.
- No dupes, physical enderchest replacement.
- Geyser/Floodgate support, UserMap built-in.
- Automatic backups, configurable.
- Uses the new cross-version NBT serializer.
- Automatic transfer of the vanilla enderchests.

## Simple Mode (Default)

Install the plugin, change the “simple-rows” 
in the config file, and you’re done.

## Advanced Mode

1. Change mode to advanced in the config.
2. Configure your permissions.
3. Edit the config to your needs.

## Permissions

- enderex.chest.[1-6] : Decide how many rows a
players has, goes from 1 to 6.
- enderex.admin: Access to the admins commands.
- enderex.edit: Allow to edit others's chests.

Other permissions are described in the config.

## Commands

- /enderex or /ec: main command.
- /enderex help: Explains all the 
other subcommands.


The plugin is open-source. If you have any issues, please post them on github.

For more “instant” support or just to talk about the plugins, join the community on discord!
https://discord.gg/jAk5PKYVeU
